description:
A regional hazmat team requires a classification report for five chemicals: Acetone (UN 1090), Chlorine (UN 1017), Hydrogen Cyanide (UN 1051), Toluene (UN 1294), and Phosgene (UN 1076). Using the CAMEO Chemicals database (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/), evaluate the 'Protective Clothing' recommendations for each. Classify a chemical as LEVEL_B if structural firefighter's gear 'provides limited protection' and LEVEL_A if it 'will NOT provide adequate protection'. Determine if Positive Pressure SCBA is recommended. Save the report to /home/ga/Documents/protective_clothing_report.txt using the following format:

CHEMICAL: [
